basic_details.job_title: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Tirupati is recruiting 01 Project Assistant in Mechanical Engineering.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 30 years | monthly salary: ₹27,000 + 10% HRA | tenure: 12 months (extendable up to 3 years)
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Mechanical/Civil/Chemical/Aerospace Engineering with minimum CGPA/percentage as per category (65% General, 60% OBC/EWS, 55% SC/ST/PwD)

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/1bHoXvptnW1cdjxX7
Detailed CV with qualifications and experience
Scanned copies of mark sheets and certificates from Class X onwards
Brief Statement of Purpose (Why interested in this project?)
Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email for in-person/online interview. No TA/DA will be paid.
important_instructions: Essential qualifications may be relaxed for outstanding candidates. IIT Tirupati reserves the right to discontinue the position with 1-month notice if performance is unsatisfactory. For queries: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Tirupati is recruiting 01 Project Assistant in Mechanical Engineering.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_tirupati_: Design and Development of a Novel Wind Turbine using Vortex-Induced Vibration

rows.details: B.Tech in Mechanical/Civil/Chemical/Aerospace Engineering with minimum CGPA/percentage as per category (65% General, 60% OBC/EWS, 55% SC/ST/PwD)

content_sections.heading: Nature of Work / Job Description
content_sections.text: CFD simulations and designing of the prototype(s). Fabrication of the prototype in maker’s lab. Testing of the prototype in a wind tunnel. Documentation, help in procurement, accounting of funds.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Tirupati Project Assistant 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates must fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/1bHoXvptnW1cdjxX7 Attach: Detailed CV with qualifications and experience Scanned copies of mark sheets and certificates from Class X onwards Brief Statement of Purpose (Why interested in this project?) Last Date: 24 July 2026 Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email for in-person/online interview. No TA/DA will be paid.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Essential qualifications may be relaxed for outstanding candidates. IIT Tirupati reserves the right to discontinue the position with 1-month notice if performance is unsatisfactory. For queries: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Tirupati Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Assistant vacancies are there at IIT Tirupati?
faq.answer: 01 vacancy in the Department of Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant at IIT Tirupati?
faq.answer: Monthly salary is ₹27,000 + 10% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IIT Tirupati ANRF Project?
faq.answer: B.Tech in Mechanical/Civil/Chemical/Aerospace Engineering with minimum required CGPA/percentage as per category.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Tirupati Vortex-Induced Vibration Wind Turbine Project?
faq.answer: Fill the Google Form at https://forms.gle/1bHoXvptnW1cdjxX7 with CV, certificates, and Statement of Purpose.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Tirupati Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Maximum 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title at IIT Tirupati Mechanical Engineering?
faq.answer: Design and Development of a Novel Wind Turbine using Vortex-Induced Vibration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Initially 12 months, extendable up to 3 years.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any interview for IIT Tirupati Project Assistant selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for in-person or online interview.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview at IIT Tirupati?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA shall be paid for attending the interview.
